code: const SESSION_KEY="fitLedger-session";const TOKEN_KEY="token";export function getStoredToken(){return localStorage.getItem(TOKEN_KEY);}export function getStoredSession(){const raw=localStorage.getItem(SESSION_KEY);if(!raw){return null;}try{return JSON.parse(raw);}catch(error){clearSession();return null;}}export function setSession(token,user){localStorage.setItem(TOKEN_KEY,token);localStorage.setItem(SESSION_KEY,JSON.stringify(user));}export function clearSession(){localStorage.removeItem(TOKEN_KEY);localStorage.removeItem(SESSION_KEY);}export function getDefaultRouteForRole(role){return role==="admin"?"/admin/gym-owners":"/dashboard";}
